name: Granny Fearing's Baked Beans
recipeIngredient: half pound thickly sliced smoked bacon
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. In a 2-quart casserole dish, combine all ingredients except bacon, seasoning with salt and pepper as desired.
3. Criss-cross top with bacon strips.
4. Cover with aluminum foil.
5. Bake for 1 hour.
6. Remove foil and continue baking for an additional 30 minutes.
7. Serve hot or cold.
